data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when form version changes.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of re-signing when the form version changes. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation or functionality of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without concrete evidence or checks, the validation cannot be conclusively determined.
gaps: No evidence of re-sign requirement implementation or validation when form version changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the re-sign requirement when form version changes.
